response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in embedded networking, security protocols (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), or switch firmware development — all essential for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex distributed systems
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded contexts or Linux kernel work
Japanese language proficiency is absent — a hard requirement
No experience with networking hardware, switch chips, or embedded security features
